agent_spec.task: Show me an example of how to use the asyncio.gather function in Python.

tools.description: Fetches Python documentation and code examples for a given module or function.

irrelevant_response.description: The Promise.all() static method takes an iterable of promises as input and returns a single Promise that resolves to an array of the results. It rejects immediately upon any of the input promises rejecting or non-promises throwing an error.
